case_title: BAY CAB et al VS. GUILLERMO ESCORCIA et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-05-2007 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
